creator: jmg@nike.efn.org
text:
you really can't add your own daily unless you modify daily...  do the same for rc the rc.local is and slurp in daily.local if it exists...

Fix: apply this fix to /etc/daily...  yeh... I know it modifies an OLD unmodified part of the system... but I thought others might find it useful...
	
How-To-Repeat: 
create a /etc/daily.local, nothing happens :)
